_metadata.description: Navico Knowledge Articles — for Copilot Agent Assist to surface during demo
_metadata.purpose: These KB articles should be surfaced by Copilot in real time during case handling — demonstrating AI-powered agent assist vs. agents manually searching Rusty Tech/ServiceTarget today.

articles.title: Simrad NSX Touchscreen Unresponsive After Firmware Update — Recovery Steps
articles.content:
**Symptom:** Simrad NSX chartplotter touchscreen becomes unresponsive following firmware update to v3.8.x.

**Root Cause:** Firmware v3.8.1 introduced a display driver update that may require a full factory calibration reset on certain display assemblies manufactured before Q3 2023.

**Resolution Steps:**
1. Hold the MENU button for 10 seconds to force a soft reset.
2. If unresponsive, power off unit completely (disconnect from power source).
3. Hold POWER + MENU simultaneously during power-on to enter Recovery Mode.
4. Select **Factory Display Calibration** from Recovery Menu.
5. Allow calibration to complete (approx. 3 minutes).
6. If issue persists after calibration, escalate to Tier 4 RMA Exchange path.

**Warranty Note:** Firmware-induced display failures are covered under the standard 3-year warranty.

**Escalation Trigger:** Units manufactured before July 2023 (serial prefix SIM-2023-NSX or earlier) have higher failure rate — flag for direct Tier 4 review.
articles.demoUse: Surface during Jake Harrington voice call — Copilot suggests this article in real time while agent is on the phone. Agent clicks 'Send to Customer' to email article while on call.

articles.title: B&G Triton2 Wind Instrument — Calibrating Apparent Wind Angle
articles.content:
**Symptom:** B&G Triton2 instrument display showing erratic or inaccurate Apparent Wind Angle (AWA) readings.

**Common Causes:**
- Wind vane sensor contamination (salt/debris)
- Transducer cable connection loose at the masthead
- Calibration offset drift after season storage
- NMEA 2000 bus interference from recently added devices

**Resolution Steps:**
1. Inspect wind vane sensor at masthead — clear debris, ensure free rotation.
2. Check NMEA 2000 connector at base of mast for corrosion.
3. On Triton2 display: **Settings > Sensors > Wind > Calibration > Auto-Calibrate Wind**.
4. Sail a full 360° circle in steady wind (minimum 8 knots) to complete auto-calibration.
5. If AWA still erratic, run **NMEA 2000 Network Diagnostics** from the display.

**Pre-Race Urgency Protocol:** If race is within 48 hours, escalate to Tier 3 for remote diagnostics session. Priority override for Platinum Expert accounts.

**Parts Required (if sensor replacement needed):** B&G Wind Transducer Kit — part WTP-BG-300.
articles.demoUse: Surface during Christine Delacroix chat — Copilot surfaces this in agent assist panel. Marco uses suggested reply to send troubleshooting steps instantly, no manual search needed.

articles.title: Lowrance HDS Live — Unit Not Powering On: Diagnostics & Warranty Claim Process
articles.content:
**Symptom:** Lowrance HDS Live unit will not power on. No screen activity when power button pressed.

**Pre-Warranty Check Steps (ask customer first):**
1. Verify 12V power lead voltage at connector (minimum 10.8V).
2. Check inline fuse (5A) on red power wire — replace if blown.
3. Try alternate power source if available.
4. Ensure connector is fully seated and pins are clean.

**If Issue Persists — Warranty Claim Initiation:**
- Verify serial number under **Settings > System > System Information** (if unit can boot at all) or check label on back of unit.
- Check warranty status using serial number in CRM warranty lookup.
- HDS Live units carry a **3-year limited warranty** from date of first retail purchase.
- Consumer-registered units: warranty start = registration date.

**Warranty Claim Path:**
1. Create Warranty Claim case type in D365.
2. Log serial number + warranty validation result.
3. If under warranty: authorize prepaid return shipping label.
4. Customer returns unit to Navico Repair Center (Tulsa, OK).
5. Target repair/exchange turnaround: 10 business days.

**For B2C Consumers:** Send confirmation email with return instructions. NPS survey auto-sends on case close.
articles.demoUse: Surface during Mike Torres email case — AI parses inbound email intent as warranty claim, case auto-created, Copilot suggests this article and drafts the response. Shows zero manual lookup vs. today's manual process.

articles.title: RMA Process Overview — Exchange, Credit, Repair, OBS
articles.content:
**Navico RMA Types:**

**1. Exchange RMA**
- Defective unit swapped for new/refurbished replacement.
- Requires: serial lookup + warranty valid + Tech Specialist (Tier 4) approval.
- ERP trigger: creates fulfillment/replacement order line.
- Use when: hardware failure confirmed, unit within warranty.

**2. Credit RMA**
- Credit issued to customer account in ERP (no physical exchange).
- Requires: Tech validation + Finance/Admin approval.
- Processed by Finance team, does not go to logistics.
- Use when: customer prefers credit vs. replacement.

**3. Repair RMA**
- Unit shipped to Navico Repair Center (Tulsa, OK or EMEA repair hub).
- Workflow: Inbound scan → Diagnosis → Repair → Outbound → Return to customer.
- ERP link: repair job created on receipt scan.
- Turnaround: 10-15 business days.
- Use when: unit repairable, customer prefers original unit back.

**4. OBS — Onboard Support Request**
- Technical specialist provides remote or on-site support to resolve issue without exchange.
- High priority — navigator/vessel owner unable to use equipment.
- Escalation to Tier 4 Product Expert required.
- Use when: vessel is operational but system needs expert configuration.

**RMA Approval Gate:**
All RMA types (except OBS) require Tier 4 Technical Specialist sign-off before ERP submission. Attach evidence (photos, error logs) to case before routing for approval.
articles.demoUse: Background KB — Copilot can reference when creating RMA case types. Useful for supervisor view to show AI-assisted categorization.

articles.title: Understanding Customer Tiers — Routing & Priority Reference
articles.content:
**Navico Customer Tier Reference (for case routing):**

| Tier | Label | Response Target | Routing |
|------|-------|----------------|----------|
| 1 | Platinum Expert | 2 hours | Dedicated Tier 4 specialist, highest queue priority |
| 2 | Platinum | 4 hours | Tier 3+ agents, priority routing |
| 3 | Gold | 8 hours (business hrs) | Tier 2+ agents, standard queue |
| 4 | Standard | 1 business day | Tier 1-2 agents |
| 5 | Consumer (B2C) | 8 hours email | Self-service first, then Tier 1 |

**B2B vs B2C Split:**
- B2B: Account-driven. Route by account tier → brand → agent skill.
- B2C: Consumer registration status determines priority (registered consumers get faster handling).

**Brand Skill Routing:**
- Lowrance cases → Lowrance product specialists
- Simrad cases → Simrad/commercial marine specialists
- B&G cases → Sailing specialists (also handle Simrad nautical)
- C-MAP cases → Chart/software specialists

**Hot Word Override:** Cases containing keywords (Navigation Failure, Safety, Emergency, Man Overboard) automatically receive +10,000 priority boost regardless of tier.
articles.demoUse: Reference during supervisor scenario — shows how intelligent routing replaces the manual 1-queue, manager-categorizes approach they have today.

articles.title: C-MAP Chart Card — Subscription Validation Error Fix
articles.content:
**Symptom:** C-MAP chart cards returning 'Subscription Validation Failed' error in C-MAP app or on-device update.

**Common Causes:**
1. Chart card registered to previous owner/account — needs re-registration.
2. C-MAP app authentication token expired — requires re-login.
3. Dealer bulk order cards not yet activated in C-MAP portal.

**Resolution Steps:**
1. Open C-MAP app → **Account > Sign Out** → Sign back in.
2. Navigate to **My Charts > Validate Charts** — allow 60 seconds.
3. If error persists: go to [c-map.com/validate](https://c-map.com) → enter card serial number manually.
4. For dealer bulk orders: confirm PO number and activation batch in Navico Dealer Portal.

**Dealer Escalation (12+ units affected):**
- Open Technical Support case in D365.
- Include: PO number, quantity, card serial range, error screenshot.
- Route to C-MAP Software Specialist team.
- Resolution target: same business day for Platinum/Gold dealers.

**Consumer Registration:** Each C-MAP card must be registered to one My C-MAP account. Transfers between accounts require dealer authorization code.
articles.demoUse: Queue case in supervisor view — demonstrates Copilot auto-categorization assigning correct skill (C-MAP specialist vs. generic tech).
